name: TRL (HuggingFace)
pricing_notes: Fully open source (Apache 2.0); GPU compute is the cost

auth.notes: Python library; HuggingFace token optional for Hub integration

performance.notes: Training throughput depends on GPU setup; SFT/DPO typically 2-5x faster with PEFT+QLoRA

agent_readiness.notes: HuggingFace Transformer Reinforcement Learning library. Standard tooling for RLHF, DPO, SFT (supervised fine-tuning), PPO, and GRPO training. Trainers for SFTTrainer, DPOTrainer, PPOTrainer, GRPOTrainer. Integrates with PEFT, Accelerate, vLLM. De-facto standard for LLM alignment training. Used by most open-source fine-tuned models.

gotchas: RLHF/PPO is unstable and harder to tune than DPO; prefer DPO for most tasks
Large reward models required for PPO (memory intensive)
Rapid development means frequent API changes between minor versions
Distributed training setup complexity for multi-GPU
best_when: LLM alignment training (RLHF, DPO, GRPO) for instruction following
Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) as first stage of alignment pipeline
Building custom AI assistant fine-tunes from open models
Research on new alignment training methods
avoid_when: No GPU budget (training requires significant compute)
Teams wanting simpler fine-tuning API (use Unsloth for ease)
summary: TRL is HuggingFace's library for LLM alignment training: RLHF, DPO, SFT, PPO, and GRPO. Provides SFTTrainer, DPOTrainer, PPOTrainer, GRPOTrainer with PEFT+QLoRA support for memory-efficient training. De-facto standard for open-source LLM fine-tuning and alignment. Integrates with Accelerate for distributed training. Most fine-tuned open models are trained with TRL.
